basic_details.job_title: CSIR TKDL Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Traditional Knowledge Digital Library Unit (CSIR TKDL)
basic_details.short_information: Traditional Knowledge Digital Library Unit (CSIR TKDL) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tkdl.res.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026 for Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology) and Project Associate-I (Urban/Rural Planning) posts.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per CSIR/Govt. of India rules for reserved/statutory categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or Forestry/Ecology or related fields, Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Planning (Urban/Rural) or Architecture or equivalent
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology): Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or Forestry/Ecology or related fields from recognized University or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Urban/Rural Planning): Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Planning (Urban/Rural) or equivalent or Architecture from recognized University or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Project Associate-I (Urban/Rural Planning): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR TKDL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR TKDL Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR TKDL Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.traditional_knowledge_digital_library_un: Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or Forestry/Ecology or related fields, Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Planning (Urban/Rural) or Architecture or equivalent

content_sections.heading: CSIR TKDL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR TKDL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR TKDL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology): Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or Forestry/Ecology or related fields from recognized University or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Urban/Rural Planning): Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Planning (Urban/Rural) or equivalent or Architecture from recognized University or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: As per CSIR/Govt. of India rules for reserved/statutory categories.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Project Associate-I (Urban/Rural Planning): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR TKDL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Associate-I posts in the CSIR TKDL recruitment drive for 2026. These vacancies are distributed across different specializations.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Project Associate-I posts at CSIR TKDL is Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in interview date for CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I posts at CSIR TKDL is scheduled for 03 July 2026. Candidates must report on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Project Associate-I posts at CSIR TKDL?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Associate-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved categories as per CSIR/Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at CSIR TKDL?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate-I ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on the specific post and eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for Project Associate-I (Forestry & Ecology)?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's/Integrated Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or Forestry/Ecology or related fields from a recognized University or equivalent.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I posts at CSIR TKDL is based solely on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed during this interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the CSIR TKDL office in New Delhi. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the exact venue details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID, educational, experience, category certificates), a duly filled application form (if required), and extra passport-size photographs.
